original_image_tags: Circular green seal logo with text "TECHE PUBLISHING COMPANY" and oil derrick graphic.

elements.description: One circular logo for 'The Teche Publishing Company'. The green sketch depicts an oil derrick and a tree or plant in a field, surrounded by a circular border with the company name text.
One vertical red stamp on the right margin reading 'REC'D F.B.I.' followed by the date 'DEC 5 1958'.

judge.reason: One description quotes a specific red stamp text ('REC'D F.B.I.' and 'DEC 5 1958') that the other description does not mention at all, indicating a clear hallucination of verbatim text.
